mapper.select: select m.dept_id, max(d.dept_name) as dept_name, count(distinct m.id) as total_members, count(distinct case when ac.member_id is not null then m.id end) as borrow_card_members, count(distinct m.id) - count(distinct case when ac.member_id is not null then m.id end) as normal_members, count(distinct case when ac.member_id is not null and trim(coalesce(m.remark, '')) != '' then m.id end) as unit_borrow_card_members, count(distinct case when ac.member_id is not null and trim(coalesce(m.remark, '')) = '' then m.id end) as natural_borrow_card_members, count(distinct case when ac.valid_days >= 365 then m.id end) as year_card_members, count(distinct case when ac.valid_days >= 365 and trim(coalesce(m.remark, '')) != '' then m.id end) as unit_year_card_members, count(distinct case when ac.valid_days >= 365 and trim(coalesce(m.remark, '')) = '' then m.id end) as natural_year_card_members, count(distinct case when ac.valid_days >= 180 and ac.valid_days < 365 then m.id end) as half_year_card_members, count(distinct case when ac.valid_days >= 180 and ac.valid_days < 365 and trim(coalesce(m.remark, '')) != '' then m.id end) as unit_half_year_card_members, count(distinct case when ac.valid_days >= 180 and ac.valid_days < 365 and trim(coalesce(m.remark, '')) = '' then m.id end) as natural_half_year_card_members from member m left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = m.dept_id left join ( select member_id, max(valid_days) as valid_days from member_card where status = 1 and is_del = 0 group by member_id ) ac on ac.member_id = m.id where m.status = 0 group by m.dept_id

select m.dept_id, max(d.dept_name) as dept_name, count(1) as total_login_count, sum(case when l.created_at >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-01-01') then 1 else 0 end) as year_login_count, sum(case when l.created_at >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m-01') then 1 else 0 end) as month_login_count, sum(case when l.created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day) and l.created_at < curdate() then 1 else 0 end) as yesterday_login_count from xhbs_api_log l inner join member m on l.user_id = concat('M', m.id) left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = m.dept_id where l.request_uri = '/api/mp/v1/auth/wechat-phone-login' and l.response_code = 0 group by m.dept_id

select m.dept_id, max(d.dept_name) as dept_name, count(1) as total_member_code_show_count, sum(case when l.created_at >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-01-01') then 1 else 0 end) as year_member_code_show_count, sum(case when l.created_at >= date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m-01') then 1 else 0 end) as month_member_code_show_count, sum(case when l.created_at >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day) and l.created_at < curdate() then 1 else 0 end) as yesterday_member_code_show_count from xhbs_api_log l inner join member m on l.user_id = concat('M', m.id) left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = m.dept_id where l.request_uri = '/api/mp/v1/user/member-code' and l.response_code = 0 group by m.dept_id
